briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their supposedly AI-powered shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the collapse of fintech middleware firm Synapse, highlighting critical risks in banking-as-a-service models.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is pushing credit cards into increasingly niche and unconventional territory with new rewards structures and embedded features.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple's acquisition of UK open banking firm Credit Kudos signals the tech giant's growing ambitions in financial data and lending services.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep dive into how open banking frameworks are reshaping competitive dynamics in the payments industry globally.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Repay will buy billing platform Kubra for $372 million USD](https://betakit.com/repay-will-buy-billing-platform-kubra-for-372-million-usd/)** — *BetaKit* — US-based payments company Repay is acquiring Canadian billing and payment platform Kubra for $372 million USD in a significant fintech acquisition.

- **[Canada's budget bill is finally law. Here's what that means for innovation](https://betakit.com/canadas-budget-bill-is-finally-law-heres-what-that-means-for-innovation/)** — *BetaKit* — Canada's newly passed budget bill is now law, with key implications for the country's innovation sector, funding programs, and tech ecosystem.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — Canada signalled a strong pivot toward open banking by labelling screen scraping as insecure and committing to a formal open banking framework. *(Relevant as Canada's open banking implementation journey remains a key regulatory backdrop for Canadian fintechs in 2026.)*

- **[NGen announces nearly $80 million for Canadian manufacturers to adopt AI](https://betakit.com/ngen-announces-nearly-80-million-for-canadian-manufacturers-to-adopt-ai/)** — *BetaKit* — NGen is deploying nearly $80 million to help Canadian manufacturers integrate AI, reflecting broader federal investment in tech-driven industrial transformation.

- **[Canada's economy saw slight growth in January with gains in mining, oil and gas](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-gdp-january-2026-9.7148199?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Canada's GDP edged up in January 2026, driven by mining and energy sectors, offering a cautiously positive backdrop for financial services activity.

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Repay will buy billing platform Kubra for $372 million USD](https://betakit.com/repay-will-buy-billing-platform-kubra-for-372-million-usd/)** — *BetaKit* — The acquisition of Canadian payments and billing platform Kubra underscores the growing M&A appetite for Canadian fintech infrastructure companies, a trend Atlantic fintech startups should watch closely as the ecosystem matures.

- **[The women most at risk from AI aren't in the rooms designing it](https://betakit.com/the-women-most-at-risk-from-ai-arent-in-the-rooms-designing-it/)** — *BetaKit* — This piece raises important questions about inclusion in AI and fintech product design, directly relevant to Atlantic Fintech's mandate around financial inclusion and building a diverse regional ecosystem.

- **[Canada's budget bill is finally law. Here's what that means for innovation](https://betakit.com/canadas-budget-bill-is-finally-law-heres-what-that-means-for-innovation/)** — *BetaKit* — With the federal budget now enshrined in law, Atlantic Canadian fintech startups and ecosystem builders should review what new funding mechanisms and innovation incentives may be accessible to the region.
